title: U.S. Revokes Visas of Board Members at Costa Rica’s Top Watchdog Newspaper
summary_full: The move came after the paper critically covered the country’s president, who has cozied up to the United States. Analysts view the visa decision as part of a White House strategy to punish critics of its allies.
summary_public: The move came after the paper critically covered the country’s president, who has cozied up to the United States. Analysts view the visa decision as part of a White House strategy to punish critics of its allies.
